name: How long does a workplace hearing loss comp case take in Utah?
description: 3-12 months; appeals longer—strong proof speeds it.[2]

mainEntity.name: How long does a workplace hearing loss comp case take in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: 3-12 months; appeals longer—strong proof speeds it.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: 3-12 months typically: filing, medical eval, hearing if disputed, Commission decision.[2] Appeals add 6-18 months.[1] Key factors: Faster if undisputed, delays from causation fights or scheduling.[1] Submit strong evidence early, use lawyer for expedites.[5] Track status with Labor Commission.[2]
